text: Amid sterile lights, glass walls, and carefully arranged chairs, I feel the subtle tension of observation—a classroom or a conference, where knowledge is exchanged in formal doses. Surrounded by displays on research and development, I am reminded of the ceaseless human urge to innovate, to define boundaries and strive beyond them. The atmosphere is both inspiring and slightly impersonal, enveloped in anticipation; I am curious and contemplative, aware of the artificiality yet drawn to the creative pulse in this space.
